title: Hamtastic Hamsters!
body:
# Hamtastic Hamsters!

A small mod that adds hamsters and enclosure decor for them.

Requires **DragN’s Livestock Overhaul 1.20.1-2.5+** as a dependency.

Hamsters spawn in Sunflower Plains and can be tamed by feeding them Hamster Food (crafted with one Pumpkin Seed, one Wheat Seed, one Beetroot Seed, and one Melon Seed)

**Be careful, as tamed hamsters of the same gender will fight one another if kept in the same area. (Configurable)**

Hamsters are great farmers and will help you out with your garden. Simply take your hamster to some nearby crops and allow it to Wander by shift-left-clicking it. It’ll begin to find any fully-grown crops and will harvest and replant them, keeping the harvest in their 3-slot inventory for you.

You can access their inventory by shift-right-clicking them. 

Hamsters come in lots of fun colors and patterns, along with 3 different breeds.

-Syrian

-Fluffy

-Dwarf

**Discord: https://discord.gg/2WznNTtVac**

Thank you to HypsiEzee for funding this project!

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
